details.note: Rewrote ipc.ts from 396-line god module to 49-line composition root. Removed all inline handler registrations (init, config, store, fs, session, window, locale, plugin, github) — each is now imported from its domain module. Added idempotent guard. Preserved RELAUNCH handler and 3 push helpers. Removed dead getStoredLocale export. Typecheck: 0 new errors.
